name: feroxbuster (Fast, Recursive Content Discovery)

auth.notes: Pass cookies/tokens via -H or --cookies for authenticated scanning

performance.notes: Rust-based; extremely fast with concurrent async requests

agent_readiness.notes: Rust-based recursive web content discovery. feroxbuster -u https://target -w wordlist. Recursive scanning (--depth 3). --auto-tune for adaptive rate limiting. JSON/NDJSON output. Status/size/word/line filters. Extensions: -x php,html,js. Wildcard detection. Resume scans with --resume-from. Interactive controls (pause/resume/filter). TOML config file (~/.config/feroxbuster/ferox-config.toml). The recommended alternative to gobuster for recursive discovery.

gotchas: Auto-tune may still overload fragile applications
Large wordlists + recursion can run for hours
best_when: Deep content discovery in complex web apps
Penetration testing engagements requiring thorough enumeration
CI/CD authorized security scans with JSON output
avoid_when: When simple depth-1 scan suffices (ffuf faster setup)
summary: feroxbuster is the go-to Rust-based recursive web content discovery tool. Automatic recursion, adaptive rate limiting (--auto-tune), NDJSON output, wildcard detection, and scan resumption. Better than gobuster for recursive scanning. Pairs with SecLists. Interactive controls for live tuning. Only use on authorized targets.
